diagrams.title: Operating System Layers
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical structure of OS components from hardware to user applications
diagrams.purpose: Understanding OS architecture and component interaction

diagrams.title: Boot Process Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step sequence from power-on to OS loading
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how computer starts and OS takes control

diagrams.title: User Mode vs Kernel Mode
diagrams.description: Shows the two processor execution modes and their privileges
diagrams.purpose: Understanding privilege levels and security boundaries

diagrams.title: Process State Diagram
diagrams.description: Standard process state transitions in an OS
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how processes move through different execution states
